channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Tom Waits and Kathleen Brennan Announce New Curated Covers Song Compilation
item.description: 🎶 Dive into a world of eclectic sounds with Tom Waits & Kathleen Brennan's curated covers compilation! 🎵 #MusicNews #NewRelease

item.title: Anitta to Make Her ‘SNL’ Debut With Colman Domingo as Host
item.description: 🎶 Pop princess Anitta is taking the stage on 'SNL' with the incredible Colman Domingo! Let's get ready to dance! 💃 #AnittaSNL 🌟

item.title: Tortoise announce North American summer tour
item.description: 🐢 Get ready to groove! Tortoise is hitting the road for a summer tour in North America! 🎶🚐 #Tortoise #SummerTour

item.title: Paul McCartney Revisits Bygone ‘Days’ On New Album
item.description: 🌟 Paul McCartney bringing back the good old ‘Days’ on his upcoming album! 🎶 Who’s ready to take a nostalgic trip? #PaulMcCartney #NewMusicAlert 🚀

item.title: Weezer Gathers Anew For Fall Tour
item.description: 🎸 Weezer is hitting the road this fall! Who's ready to rock out with them? 🎶 #Weezer #FallTourFun
